title: Senior PHP Laravel Software Engineer
description: About Jack Westin Jack Westin is a leading Medical College Admissions Test (MCAT) preparation company which is known for crafting high quality, but free, practice materials. The MCAT tests students on the scientific reasoning skills and scientific knowledge which can be learned during typical undergraduate coursework. Our Three Principles As we continue to grow and help students, we are guided by three major principles that we believe are vital to our community. Attention to quality We only create courses and practice questions that we would use. That means having the best, first-class teaching content that can possibly exist. We're not satisfied with mediocrity. We don't care about the amount of time or money it takes to get something done right. If it's not perfect, we won't stop until we believe it is. This ethos runs deep within our company. Excellence in support We're obsessed with our students. Their well-being and success drives us each day. Great customer service is not an afterthought. It is the most important service we can offer. We understand that our students come from different learning backgrounds. It's our mission to ensure that each one has an amazing experience. Learn from anywhere at anytime We are committed to building the future of education on the internet so that it is easily accessible to all students from around the world. Our dedication is to all students who want to learn, regardless of their pace, and no matter what time of the day it is. About The Role We are hiring a Senior PHP Laravel Software Engineer to lead backend architecture, mentor engineering teams, and build high-performance, scalable systems. This role requires strong technical leadership and deep Laravel expertise. Responsibilities Lead backend architecture and technical decisions Design scalable and secure distributed systems Build and optimize high-performance APIs and services Review and enforce engineering best practices Mentor junior and mid-level engineers Improve CI/CD and deployment workflows Lead technical planning and estimation Ensure application scalability, security, and reliability Collaborate with product and business stakeholders Handle critical production incidents and root cause analysis Drive engineering process improvements Required Skills 6+ years of PHP development experience Deep Laravel framework expertise Advanced database architecture knowledge Strong system design and scalability experience Experience with queues, Redis, caching, and event-driven systems CI/CD and DevOps understanding Cloud infrastructure experience (AWS, GCP, DigitalOcean, etc.) Strong debugging and performance optimization skills Leadership and mentoring experience Nice to Have Microservices architecture Kubernetes and container orchestration Event sourcing/CQRS knowledge High-traffic application experience Security auditing experience What We Offer 100% remote, full-time position $2,000–$2,500/month (depending on experience) Real ownership and impact

title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer (Vue.js / React)
description: About Jack Westin Jack Westin is a leading Medical College Admissions Test (MCAT) preparation company which is known for crafting high quality, but free, practice materials. The MCAT tests students on the scientific reasoning skills and scientific knowledge which can be learned during typical undergraduate coursework. Our Three Principles As we continue to grow and help students, we are guided by three major principles that we believe are vital to our community. Attention to quality We only create courses and practice questions that we would use. That means having the best, first-class teaching content that can possibly exist. We're not satisfied with mediocrity. We don't care about the amount of time or money it takes to get something done right. If it's not perfect, we won't stop until we believe it is. This ethos runs deep within our company. Excellence in support We're obsessed with our students. Their well-being and success drives us each day. Great customer service is not an afterthought. It is the most important service we can offer. We understand that our students come from different learning backgrounds. It's our mission to ensure that each one has an amazing experience. Learn from anywhere at anytime We are committed to building the future of education on the internet so that it is easily accessible to all students from around the world. Our dedication is to all students who want to learn, regardless of their pace, and no matter what time of the day it is. About The Role We are seeking a Mid-Level Frontend Developer with strong experience in Vue.js and/or React to help build scalable, high-performance web applications. You will take ownership of frontend modules, collaborate across teams, and contribute to technical decision-making and product improvements. Responsibilities Build scalable frontend applications using Vue.js and/or React Develop reusable components and shared frontend libraries Optimize application performance and responsiveness Collaborate with UI/UX, backend, and product teams Review code and mentor junior developers Integrate APIs and third-party services Participate in architecture and technical discussions Ensure application quality through testing and debugging Required Skills 2-5 years of frontend development experience Experience with Nuxt.js or Next.js Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+) and TypeScript Solid experience with Vue.js or React ecosystems Experience with state management tools Strong understanding of REST APIs and asynchronous programming Experience with responsive and cross-browser development Familiarity with Git workflows and CI/CD pipelines Understanding of frontend performance optimization Good communication and collaboration skills What We Offer 100% remote, full-time position $1,500–$2,000/month (depending on experience) Real ownership and impact

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: WordPress and React Developer
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a WordPress and React Developer in Turkey. This role is an opportunity to work on widely used WordPress products and modern React-based interfaces within a globally distributed engineering team. You will contribute to the development of high-traffic themes and plugins used by hundreds of thousands of users worldwide, shaping tools that power websites, agencies, and freelance developers. The environment is highly collaborative yet flat, encouraging ownership, initiative, and creativity in problem-solving. A significant part of the work focuses on building and enhancing front-end experiences using React while maintaining strong backend foundations in WordPress. You will work in an open-source-influenced culture where clean, elegant code and thoughtful engineering are highly valued. The role suits developers who enjoy autonomy, continuous learning, and contributing to products with a strong community impact. It is a fully remote position with a global team. Accountabilities In this role, you will contribute to the design, development, and improvement of WordPress-based products and modern React-driven interfaces. Develop and maintain WordPress themes and plugins with a focus on scalability, performance, and security. Build and enhance interactive front-end features using React and modern JavaScript practices. Collaborate with a distributed team using Git-based workflows and agile communication tools. Contribute to architectural decisions and propose elegant solutions to complex technical challenges. Ensure code quality through best practices in PHP, JavaScript, and WordPress development standards. Participate actively in improving product features, usability, and overall user experience. Stay engaged with modern web technologies and open-source ecosystem trends. Requirements We are looking for an experienced full-stack-oriented WordPress developer with strong front-end expertise in React and solid backend fundamentals. Strong understanding of WordPress core architecture at code level. Proven experience building custom WordPress themes and plugins. Solid proficiency in PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS/SASS, and JavaScript (ES6). Hands-on experience with React and modern front-end development workflows. Familiarity with jQuery and Git version control systems. Strong knowledge of WordPress coding standards and security best practices. Ability to work independently in a remote, distributed, and agile environment. Strong problem-solving mindset with attention to clean, maintainable code. Bonus: experience with Redux, Gutenberg block development, TypeScript, or testing frameworks like Jest, PHPUnit, or WPUnit. Bonus: contributions to open-source projects or active participation in developer communities. Benefits Fully remote role with a globally distributed engineering team. Competitive salary aligned with experience. Paid vacation and comprehensive employee benefits. Opportunity to work on widely used WordPress products with a large global user base. Access to modern development workflows and collaborative engineering tools (GitHub, Slack, etc.). Strong culture of learning, ownership, and professional growth. Chance to contribute to impactful open-source-inspired products. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer (.NET + Next.js + AWS) Marketplace
description: Açıklama: Lokasyon: İstanbul, Remote / Hybrid / Ofis Çalışma Türü: Full Time (Marketplace) Proje: Yeni nesil etik/vicdan odaklı pazaryeri platformu: Türkiyemin.com Türkiye merkezli proje, Dünya’nın geleceğini çizen Teknolojinin, kâr ve şahsi odaklı değil, "Vicdan" ve "Merhamet" merkezli kullanıldığı bir gelecek inşa etmeyi amaçlar. Elde edilen gelirlerin daha fazla lüks değil, daha fazla genç yazılımcıların istihdamı, Yerli AR-GE çalışmaları ve ülkede olmayan stratejik teknolojilere yatırım yapılması hedeflenmektedir. Bu amaç doğrultusunda ile ilk önemli Ulusal projesi olan Vicdanlı & Bilinçli E-Pazaryeri platformumuz için ölçeklenebilir mimarisiyle inşaası devam eden E-Marketplace projesinde, mevcut sistemi sahiplenebilecek .NET, Next.js ve AWS altyapısı üzerinde teknik yetkinliğini toplumsal faydayla birleştirecek yol arkadaşları arıyoruz. Sorumluluklar Mevcut backend servislerini geliştirmek ve sürdürülebilir hale getirmek Yeni API servisleri tasarlamak ve geliştirmek Frontend tarafında yeni ekranlar ve kullanıcı akışları geliştirmek PostgreSQL veritabanı yapısını optimize etmek AWS servisleri ile entegrasyonlar geliştirmek Dosya, ürün, Excel ve medya işleme süreçlerini yönetmek Docker tabanlı deployment süreçlerine katkı sağlamak Kod kalitesi, performans ve güvenlik standartlarını uygulamak Teknik dokümantasyon üretmek ve güncel tutmak Gerektiğinde ürün mimarisine katkı sunmak Takım içi teknik karar süreçlerine katılmak Backend Yetkinlikleri (Zorunlu) .NET / C# İleri seviye: C# (.NET 8/9/10+) ASP.NET Core Web API Async/Await LINQ Generics Pattern Matching Dependency Injection Middleware Minimal Hosting RESTful API tasarımı Authentication / Authorization Beklenen: JWT Claims Policy bazlı yetkilendirme BCrypt Secure coding prensipleri Database Yetkinlikleri PostgreSQL İyi seviyede: JOIN CTE Aggregate sorgular Index optimizasyonları JSONB pg_trgm RLS Entity Framework Core Code First Migration yönetimi DbContext Include / projection Performanslı sorgular DynamoDB Tercihen: Partition key TTL Condition expressions Frontend Yetkinlikleri React / Next.js / TypeScript İleri seviye: React Hooks TypeScript Next.js App Router Server Components Client Components SSR / CSR Beklenen: useState useEffect useMemo useCallback TypeScript interfaces Generics Union Types State & Form Yönetimi Beklenen: React Query useQuery useMutation Cache invalidation React Hook Form register controller handleSubmit Zod Validation schema Error yönetimi UI / CSS Yetkinlikleri Tailwind CSS Responsive tasarım Flex/Grid Dark mode CSS temelleri Beklenen: Position z-index overflow media query AWS / Cloud Yetkinlikleri İyi seviyede: AWS S3 SQS SES ECS ECR CloudWatch IAM Tercihen: AWS SDK (.NET) Örnek: S3Client SQSClient SESClient Beklenen: Container deployment mantığı Log yönetimi Monitoring DevOps Yetkinlikleri Tercihen: Docker Docker Compose Multi-stage build Container lifecycle Build/tag/push süreçleri Mimari Bilgiler Beklenen: Katmanlı mimari SOLID Interface tabanlı geliştirme Dependency Injection Asenkron mesaj işleme Queue/Consumer mantığı Idempotency Test edilebilir kod anlayışı Artı Puanlar Aşağıdaki konularda deneyim avantaj sağlar: Marketplace sistemleri Multi-tenant mimari E-commerce deneyimi Elasticsearch Redis Event-driven architecture Kafka / RabbitMQ CI/CD Kubernetes Seni Neler Bekliyor? Teknik Özgürlük: Modern mimari kararlarında aktif rol alabileceğin bir çalışma ortamı. Anlamlı Bir Vizyon: Sadece kod yazmakla kalmayıp, milli üretimi destekleyen bir idealin parçası olma fırsatı. Esneklik: Bilişim Vadisi Ofis, Hibrit veya Uzaktan (Remote) çalışma modeli. Süreklilik: Uzun vadeli, istikrarlı ve gelişim odaklı bir proje. Destek: Kademeli büyüyerek ilerleyecek Maaş (Senior ve Jr değişkenlik gösterecektir) + Konaklama Destek + Yemek + Sigorta Başvuru: kariyer@turkiyemin.com adresine: CV’niz ile beraber, GitHub, LinkedIn ve mümkünse gerçekleştirdiğiniz projeleri paylaşmanızı rica ederiz.
